title: TeamsClient.post_message has no response body size cap on error path
description: teams.rs post_message reads the full error response body via resp.text().await.unwrap_or_default() with no byte cap. A hostile Teams-compatible endpoint or webhook proxy can respond with an arbitrarily large error body, causing the process to buffer it entirely in memory. Same class as nie-kef6.104 (SlackClient). Trigger: return a multi-GB error body from the Teams webhook URL.
